summary: Comprehensive testing of new RMS Module implementation. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (1 bug fixed - datetime timezone issue in generate-pricing). Frontend: All UI components working - Dashboard with 5 KPI cards, 3 charts, period selector, pricing recommendations; Yield Rules tab with 5 pre-seeded rules and CRUD; Seasonal Calendar with 6 pre-seeded seasons and visual timeline; Generate Pricing button working.
seed_data_creation: 5 yield rules and 6 seasonal calendar entries pre-seeded via auto_seed.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: RMS Module completely rewritten to use internal hotel data only (no competitor dependency). New endpoints: /api/rms/dashboard-kpis, /api/rms/yield-rules (CRUD), /api/rms/seasonal-calendar (CRUD), /api/rms/generate-pricing. Frontend route: /app/gelir-yonetimi with 4 tabs (Dashboard, Yield Kurallari, Sezon Takvimi, Autopilot). All prices in TRY currency.

dashboard_kpis.GET /api/rms/dashboard-kpis: PASS - Returns occupancy, ADR, RevPAR, cancel_rate, pickup_rate, channels, room_type_performance, daily_trend

rms_dashboard_tab.kpi_cards: PASS - Doluluk (35.6%), ADR (8,105 TRY), RevPAR (2,882 TRY), Rez Hizi (1/gun), Iptal Orani (3.9%)
rms_dashboard_tab.doluluk_trendi_chart: PASS - Line chart renders with data
rms_dashboard_tab.kanal_dagilimi_chart: PASS - Doughnut chart renders (Expedia, Booking.com, Web Sitesi, Direkt, Airbnb)
rms_dashboard_tab.oda_tipi_performansi_chart: PASS - Bar chart renders (Superior, Deluxe, Junior Suite, Suite, Standard, Family)
rms_dashboard_tab.recommendations_table: PASS - Shows 15 rows with date, room_type, current_rate, suggested_rate, change_pct, occupancy, confidence

yield_kurallari_tab.add_rule_form: PASS - Opens with all fields (name, priority, description, condition_type, condition_value, action_type, action_value, is_active)

sezon_takvimi_tab.yillik_gorunum_timeline: PASS - Visual timeline renders correctly showing seasons across months
sezon_takvimi_tab.seasons_list: PASS - Shows 6 pre-seeded seasons (Ara Sezon Ilkbahar, Yaz Sezonu, Bayram Donemi, Ara Sezon Sonbahar, Kis Sezonu, Yilbasi)
sezon_takvimi_tab.add_season_form: PASS - Opens with all fields (name, season_type, start_date, end_date, rate_multiplier, min_stay, color)

bug_fixed.issue: TypeError: can't subtract offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes in /api/rms/generate-pricing
bug_fixed.root_cause: date_obj was created without timezone info while 'now' had UTC timezone
bug_fixed.fix: Added .replace(tzinfo=UTC) to date_obj creation on line 2563
